outlook.volatilityExpectation: Intraday volatility expected due to negative 0DTE GEX, stabilized by positive weekly/monthly GEX.
outlook.summary: Market is balancing at the 670 major resonance level (0DTE Max Pain). Negative 0DTE GEX implies choppy intraday price action, but substantial positive GEX in weekly and monthly expiries provides a structural stabilizing backbone. Watch 675 as the primary Call Wall resistance.

levels.motivazione: Massive Call OI concentration across all expirations (0DTE 4800, Weekly 29866, Monthly 24510) creates a strong structural ceiling.
0DTE Max Pain combined with huge 0DTE Put OI (9560) and heavy Volume. Acts as the primary intraday equilibrium.
Significant Put OI concentration acting as a structural floor in the weekly (79818) and monthly (37228) expirations.
Heavy Call OI in weekly (7298) and monthly (24456) expirations defining the upper boundary of the volatility range.
High 0DTE Call OI (4820) with massive volume (155k) indicating aggressive intraday short-gamma resistance.
Dominant 0DTE Put OI (9955) creating a localized intraday demand zone to trap market makers.
Major Monthly Call OI (34715) establishing a firm intermediate-term resistance level.
